title: Lighting Wand 🌟
description: Wand that can place invisible light source! also supports Colored Lighting
body:
# Lighting Wand 🌟

This mod adds a Lighting Wand to place invisible light source. You can see the block bound only if you have the wand in hand. And it is very configurable that you can repair the wand with glowstone dust or Forge energy. You can shoot a light blob by right-clicking (really far)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lak1V0eP/images/ef488291f0eabd4a23d6d221e702fc86b0068fbe.gif)
